ranked.cve_severity_detail: Max CVSS 10.0 (CVE-2021-44228) + density bonus (3 additional CVEs x 0.5 = 1.5), capped at 10
ranked.business_criticality_detail: Used directly in DiscountCalculator (billing/invoice service); log4j imports confirmed in src/main. Service name 'invoice-service' and discount/payment logic = payment-adjacent code (+5)
ranked.rationale: Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228, CVSS 10.0) directly imported in the billing invoice service DiscountCalculator. JNDI injection enables unauthenticated RCE over the network. CRITICAL floor applies; fix available as 2.17.1.

ranked.cve_severity_detail: Max CVSS 10.0 (CVE-2021-44228), single CVE, no density bonus
ranked.business_criticality_detail: Same DiscountCalculator billing context as log4j-core; log4j-api imported directly in source
ranked.rationale: Co-vulnerable with log4j-core via Log4Shell. Direct import in payment-adjacent billing class. Must be upgraded in lockstep with log4j-core to 2.17.1.

ranked.cve_severity_detail: Max CVSS 9.8 (CVE-2019-14379, CVE-2019-14540) + density bonus (4 additional CVEs x 0.5 = 2.0) = 11.8, capped at 10
ranked.business_criticality_detail: No direct import found in source files; compile-scope dep in invoice service. Default criticality applied.
ranked.rationale: 5 CVEs including 2 CRITICAL RCE gadget-chain deserialization vulnerabilities. Direct compile dependency with no import detected (likely used transitively at runtime). Floor HIGH due to CRITICAL CVEs. Fix: 2.13.4.2.

ranked.cve_severity_detail: No CVEs attributable — coordinate fails to resolve from Maven Central; cannot be scanned
ranked.exposure_detail: direct(+4) + compile(+3) = 7; supply-chain CRITICAL override applied
ranked.band_override: Supply-chain CRITICAL: typosquatted coordinate; band manually elevated regardless of numeric score
ranked.rationale: groupId 'com.fastxml.jackson.core' does not exist on Maven Central — impersonates 'com.fasterxml.jackson.core'. Resolution failure confirms fictitious or malicious coordinate. A real version of this package could execute arbitrary code at build or runtime. Remove immediately.

ranked.cve_severity_detail: Max CVSS 5.9 (CVE-2018-10237) + density bonus (2 additional CVEs x 0.5 = 1.0) = 6.9
ranked.business_criticality_detail: No direct import found in source files; compile-scope dep in invoice service. Default criticality applied.
ranked.rationale: 3 CVEs including remote-exploitable unbounded memory allocation (DoS) and insecure temp-file handling (local information disclosure). Direct compile dep. Upgrade to 32.0.0-jre (review API breakage).

ranked.cve_severity_detail: No CVEs in current version; GPL-2.0 license violation is non-CVE risk
ranked.business_criticality_detail: Database connector in an invoice/billing service context implies access to payment or PII data (+5)
ranked.rationale: GPL-2.0 license is incompatible with commercial or permissive-licensed projects (copyleft contamination). No current CVEs but version is outdated. Evaluate replacement with mysql:mysql-connector-j (GPL-2.0 exception) or com.mysql:mysql-connector-j.

ranked.cve_severity_detail: No known CVEs in NVD for this coordinate at this version
ranked.business_criticality_detail: No direct import found in source files; default criticality applied
ranked.rationale: Severely outdated (2.4 vs 2.18.0 current). No active CVEs but multiple security-relevant fixes have shipped in intermediate versions. Routine upgrade.

ranked.cve_severity_detail: No known CVEs in NVD for this coordinate at this version
ranked.business_criticality_detail: No direct import found in source files; default criticality applied
ranked.rationale: Outdated (3.4 vs 3.17.0 current). No active CVEs. Routine upgrade recommended to benefit from bug fixes and performance improvements.
Test-scope only; no production blast radius. Outdated but low operational risk. Upgrade at convenience.
